reference: Hello Doctor, I am twenty-four years old. I have had problems with excessive imagination since I was a child. I imagine that I am a winner and envision what I want and where I want to go. However, I am still facing these problems in my job, education, and personal relationships. I imagine everything I love, but in reality, it is not what I am doing. I feel guilty about what I think. Please help me. How can I stop these issues with excessive imagination?
text: Hello, doctor. I am 24 years old. I have had problems with excessive imagination since I was a child. I imagine that I am a winner and envision what I want and where I want to go. However, I am still facing these problems in my job, education, and personal relationships. I imagine everything I love, but in reality, it is not what I am doing. I feel guilty about what I think. Please help me. How can I stop these issues with excessive imagination?
